case_title: KEELINE WILCOX VS. SEBASTIAN COLABIANCHI LAUNDROMAT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILCOX, KEELINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEBASTIAN COLABIANCHI LAUNDROMAT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-30-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEBASTIAN COLABIANCHI LAUNDROMAT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY WILCOX, KEELINE AS TO DEFENDANT SEBASTIAN COLABIANCHI LAUNDROMAT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SEBASTIAN COLABIANCHI LAUNDROMAT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
